## Summary

Describe the user-visible or maintenance outcome.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the closest focused tests or validation.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm check` when the change affects shared behavior.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation, schemas, and project fixtures.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, generated experiments, model weights, or unreviewed release assets.

## Compatibility and provenance

- [ ] This keeps schema-v1 project compatibility, or the release impact is documented.
- [ ] Any asset, workflow, or third-party redistribution change is recorded in `provenance/inventory.json` and `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
